mapper.sql: select a.*, o.order_no, o.product_name, o.sku_name, u.display_name as user_display_name, assignee.display_name as assigned_to_name from after_sale_application a left join demo_order o on a.order_id=o.id left join user_account u on a.user_id=u.id left join user_account assignee on a.assigned_to=assignee.id
mapper.select: select count(*) from after_sale_application a left join demo_order o on a.order_id=o.id
order by a.updated_at desc, a.id desc limit #{s.offset}, #{s.limit}
select count(*) from after_sale_application where order_id=#{orderId} and status not in ('REJECTED', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED')
